name: Dummy Targets
effect: Increase the production of Elven Training Grounds based on Faction Coins found this game.
formula: (3 * ln(1+x)^3)%, where x = FC found this game

name: Cultivation
effect: Increase the production of Inns and Blacksmiths by 70% per Enchanted Field built.
formula: ×70% per Enchanted Field built

name: Light Condenser
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on spells cast this Era.
formula: +(20 * ln(1+x)^2), where x = spells cast this Era

name: Refining
effect: Increase the production of Infernal Realms based on Demon Coins found this game.
formula: (0.3 * ln(1+x)^3)%, where x = Demon Coins found this game

name: Apprenticeship
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Faction Coins found this Era. Best bonus to lowest tiers.
formula: ((7 * ln(1+x)^1.4) * (1.4^(12-T)))%, where x = FC found this Era, T = building tier

name: Woodcraft
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on Unique Buildings built.
formula: (x^0.5)%, where x = Unique Buildings built

name: Socketing
effect: Increase clicking reward based on Gems owned.
formula: (5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = Gems owned

name: Reinforcing
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique Buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (40 * x^0.4)%, where x = clicks this Reincarnation

name: Tinkering
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Research Points.
formula: (18 * x^0.6)%, where x = Research Points

name: Gemcutting
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on buildings built.
formula: (0.25 * x^0.5)%, where x = buildings built

name: Journeymen
effect: Increase production of Unique Buildings based on time spent as that building's alignment this Reincarnation.
formula: (25 + 1.25 * x^0.75)%, where x = sum of time as building's alignment(s) this Reincarnation

name: Automatons
effect: Each Elven Training Ground counts as more buildings for Call to Arms based on assistants owned.
formula: ×(20 * ln(1+x)^2), where x = assistants owned

name: Magnetism
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on offline time this Reincarnation. Also increase FC chance by 50% multiplicatively.
formula: +(9 * x^0.9), where x = offline time this Reincarnation

name: Architecture
requirement: Secrets of the Ancients as Titan
effect: Increase the production of Hall of Legends based on buildings built.
formula: (80 * x^0.8)%, where x = buildings built

name: Weighting
effect: While Grand Balance hits Stone Pillars, increase their production by 2000%. Also increase production of every Grand Balance target based on Maximum Mana.
formula: 25 * (ln(1+x)^(2.5*y))%, where x = Max Mana, y = Grand Balance tier

name: Golemcraft
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = offline time this Reincarnation

name: Overload
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Research Points.
formula: +(15 * x^0.75), where x = Research Points

name: Gem Duster
requirement: 200 Gem Grinders (This R), Research Sifting (E260) & Surveyorship (E290)
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on Rubies collected (Multiplicative).
formula: floor(10 * x)%, where x = Rubies Gained (All Time)

name: Lightning Rod
effect: Olympian Halls are always hit by Lightning Strike in addition to the primary target. Olympian Halls can no longer be a primary target.

name: Gravitation
effect: Increase FC find chance additively based on FC found this game. Also increase FC chance by 100% multiplicatively.
formula: +(3.5 * ln(x+1)^3)%, where x = FC found this game

name: Distribution
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on time spent as other alignments this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.4 * x^0.6)%, where x = sum of time as other alignments this Reincarnation

name: Minecrafting
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on excavations made.
formula: (3 * x^0.35)%, where x = excavations made

name: Metallurgy
requirement: Secrets of the Underworld as Dwarf
effect: Increase the production of Blacksmiths based on Blacksmiths built.
formula: (60 * x^0.8)%, where x = Blacksmiths built

name: Blacksmithing
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on Artifacts found.
formula: (x^2)%, where x = Artifacts found

name: Alloys
requirement: 200 Dwarf Exchanges as Dwelf, Research Fusion (A105) & Blacksmithing (C520)
effect: Increase clicking reward based on FC find chance. Also autoclicks 10 times per second (offline too).
formula: (x^0.9)%, where x = FC find chance

name: Scintillation
requirement: 30,000 Max Mana as any Neutral or Dragon (This Game)
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana and production bonus from Gems.
formula: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^(0.8 * ln(1+y)^0.5))%, where x = Max Mana, y = Gems bonus

name: Plasmation
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Mana produced this Era.
formula: (1.75 * ln(1+x)^1.75)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Gargantuaness
requirement: 2,500 Royal Exchanges, Research E460 & D1275, as Titan or Dragon
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as Neutral this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.75 * x^0.75)%, where x = Neutral time this Reincarnation

name: Customizing
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on artifacts owned.
formula: (2 * x^2)%, where x = artifacts owned

name: Engineering
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.35)%, where x = clicks this Reincarnation
